reasoning: The control SI-4(20) focuses on monitoring privileged users, which can be mapped to Kubernetes audit logging and RBAC configurations. Kubernetes audit logs can track actions performed by privileged users, and ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured is crucial. Additionally, RBAC can be used to identify and monitor privileged users, and admission controllers can be configured to log actions taken by these users.
